creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
In PR # 284127, epsonscan2 was updated from 6.6.40 to 6.7.70.  It was tested and working on 14.1, 14.2 and 15-cur.

Alex, if you're interested and have time, could you test with your WP-4540 to see if we still have a problem re this PR?

Or please close this PR if this is no longer relevant.  Thanks.
